characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Self

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text:
Spend 3 mutation tokens, then summon a duplicate of this character in range 1-2 without this ability. Then duplicate all tokens on this character and place them on the copy.
• This ability can only be used once per combat.
• May destroy all walls in the duplicate’s space before placing it.

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Range 1-2

characteristics.name: On Hit
characteristics.$text: Create a wall in range. When the wall is destroyed, create four corpses in adjacent spaces, which could be placed under characters.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: This unit’s HP equals the number of mutation tokens it has (max 6). When it takes damage, it discards that many mutation tokens instead. If at start or end of any turn it has 0 mutation tokens, it is slain.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: When choosing to MOVE again, destroys all walls it moves into.

constraints.message: To add more than one unit of the same type, use the selection inside the unit type.

sharedRules.name: Spare Parts
sharedRules.description: If an ability has spare parts, the unit may absorb any number of adjacent corpses at the start of this ability to grant it additional effects, removing those corpses.

sharedRules.name: Mutate
sharedRules.description: When a unit mutates, it gains a mutation token. Mutation tokens can be discarded instead of discarding any other token. (Mutation tokens can be a stand-in and act as a ‘copy’ for any other token, allowing you to keep the original)

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Starts combat with 4 mutation tokens.
